audit_items.proof_trace: The guard at line 327 (`if (s_auctionStarts[asset] != 0) revert LiveAuction()`) runs unconditionally at the top of the eligibleAssets loop, before the sole write to s_auctionStarts at line 353. No other function writes s_auctionStarts to a non-zero value; the endedAuctions loop runs entirely after the eligibleAssets loop and cannot pre-clear a live auction to enable a restart in the same transaction.
